sample_method: Metadata-only stratified sample over top-level original posts; no text keywords or label rules used for sampling.
label_guideline: Hate speech means author-endorsed targeting of a protected identity group. Quoted/reported/condemned hate, institutional criticism, political criticism, personal insults, and body-size-only insults are not labeled hate unless they target a protected identity group.

entries.label: hate_speech
entries.notes: LLM verified as author-endorsed hate toward a protected identity group.
